name: Ping
effects: Reveals all networked devices and enemies connected to the same network
Highlighted enemies can be targeted through walls with other quickhacks
Essential scouting tool for Netrunners

name: Short Circuit
effects: Deals moderate Electrical damage to target
Deals increased damage to drones, mechs, and robots
Can be spread to nearby enemies at higher rarity
Chance to apply EMP effect on mechanical enemies

name: Overheat
effects: Deals Thermal damage over time to target
Applies burn effect preventing health regeneration
Damage continues even if target breaks line of sight
At higher rarity, can spread to nearby enemies

name: Contagion
effects: Deals Chemical damage over time and applies poison
Spreads automatically to nearby enemies within range
Can jump between up to 3 targets at base rarity
Reduces enemy movement speed while active
Excellent for clearing groups

name: Synapse Burnout
effects: Deals high Physical damage to target
Bonus damage against enemies at low health
Damage scales with Intelligence attribute
Good finisher quickhack

name: Cripple Movement
effects: Immobilizes target completely for duration
Target cannot move but can still attack
Useful for stopping rushing melee enemies
Does not alert nearby enemies

name: Weapon Glitch
effects: Jams target's weapon making it unusable
At higher rarity, can cause weapon to explode dealing damage to wielder
Forces enemies into melee combat
Excellent against ranged enemies

name: Cyberware Malfunction
effects: Disables target's cyberware abilities
Prevents enemies from using Sandevistan, Berserk, or arm cyberware
At higher rarity, deals damage when cyberware is disabled
Very effective against heavily cybered enemies

name: Request Backup
effects: Forces target to call for backup, luring additional enemies to their position
Can be used to group enemies together for area attacks
The reinforcement path is predictable and exploitable

name: Distract Enemies
effects: Causes nearby device to emit noise attracting enemy attention
Target device plays audio loop drawing enemies to investigate
Does not directly affect enemies
Useful for creating diversions during stealth

name: Sonic Shock
effects: Deafens target, preventing them from hearing gunfire and combat sounds
Isolates target from communicating with allies
Target cannot call for help or alert others
Excellent stealth tool for isolating targets

name: Memory Wipe
effects: Resets target to unalerted state immediately
Target forgets they detected you
Also resets nearby enemies who were alerted by the target
Essential for recovering from stealth failures

name: Reboot Optics
effects: Blinds target by disabling their optical cyberware
Target cannot see and will fire wildly or search aimlessly
Does not break stealth when applied
Allows easy repositioning or takedowns

name: Whistle
effects: Lures target to your position
Target investigates source of whistle
Can be used to isolate enemies for stealth takedowns
Does not alert other nearby enemies

name: System Reset
effects: Instantly renders target unconscious (non-lethal)
Works on all enemy types regardless of level
Target drops silently without alerting others
Cannot be applied during open combat at base level
One of the most powerful stealth quickhacks

name: Suicide
effects: Forces target to eliminate themselves with their own weapon
Instant kill regardless of enemy health
Nearby enemies become frightened and may flee
Long upload time leaves you vulnerable
Extremely high RAM cost

name: Cyberpsychosis
effects: Turns target into a temporary ally who attacks all nearby enemies
Affected target fights with increased aggression
Target eventually dies when effect ends
Other enemies will prioritize attacking the affected target
Extremely effective crowd control

name: Detonate Grenade
effects: Forces target to pull a grenade and detonate it on themselves
Deals explosive damage to target and nearby enemies
Only works on enemies carrying grenades
Damage scales with the enemy's grenade type

name: Short Circuit (Legendary)
effects: Deals massive Electrical damage to target
Spreads to 2 nearby enemies automatically
Deals triple damage to mechanical enemies
Passive: Any critical hit with any weapon triggers Short Circuit effect

name: Contagion (Legendary)
effects: Deals high Chemical damage over time with powerful poison
Spreads to up to 6 targets automatically
Increased spread range and damage per tick
Significantly reduces enemy movement speed

name: Overheat (Legendary)
effects: Deals massive Thermal damage over time
Spreads to 2 nearby enemies
Applies severe burn that prevents healing
Can finish off low-health enemies instantly

name: Weapon Glitch (Legendary)
effects: Jams target's weapon and causes it to backfire dealing damage
Spreads to nearby enemies
Jammed weapons explode after duration dealing area damage
Forces all affected enemies into melee

name: Reboot Optics (Legendary)
effects: Blinds target and spreads to 2 nearby enemies
Extended blindness duration
Blinded enemies have severely reduced accuracy
Does not break stealth

name: Synapse Burnout (Legendary)
effects: Deals very high Physical damage
Massive bonus damage to enemies below 50% health (execute threshold)
Can spread to one nearby enemy at reduced damage
Excellent finisher quickhack

name: Ping (Legendary)
effects: Reveals entire network of connected enemies and devices
Highlighted targets can be hacked through walls
Reveals quickhack vulnerabilities on all scanned targets
Longer reveal duration

name: Memory Wipe (Legendary)
effects: Instantly resets all enemies in the area to unalerted state
Wipes combat awareness from all connected enemies
Affected enemies forget your last known position
Full area reset for stealth recovery

name: Cripple Movement (Legendary)
effects: Completely immobilizes target for extended duration
Spreads to 2 nearby enemies
Immobilized targets take 15% increased damage
Does not alert other enemies

name: Cyberware Malfunction (Legendary)
effects: Disables all cyberware on target and nearby enemies
Disabled cyberware deals Electrical damage to the user
Prevents all cyberware-based abilities and defenses
Spreads to 2 nearby enemies
